[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10010000 2
1 00110100 3
2 01011101 5
3 10010101 4
4 10100011 4
5 10110111 6
6 10111111 7
7 10101011 5
